name: asset-browser
description: Reusable asset browser with manifest, prompts, upload/review workflow — deploys to Vercel.

scripts.test: node --test api/_handler.test.js api/_ratelimit.test.js api/_modules.test.js api/_health.test.js api/_headers.test.js
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run validate
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx serve public -l 5174
